name: Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation
description: Focuses on improving healthcare and reducing poverty through evidence-based programs. Prioritizes scalable, systems-level change with measurable outcomes.

name: Ford Foundation
description: Committed to reducing inequality and strengthening democratic values. Funds grassroots movements and advocacy organizations.

name: USAID Development Innovation Ventures
description: US government agency funding innovative development solutions. Focuses on cost-effectiveness, scalability, and local ownership.

name: Wellcome Trust
description: Funds science and research to improve health. Strong focus on infectious diseases and mental health in low-income countries.

name: Mastercard Foundation
description: Focused exclusively on Africa. Funds programs that create dignified and fulfilling work for young people.

name: Rockefeller Foundation
description: Promotes the wellbeing of humanity by transforming food systems and health equity. Strong focus on climate resilience.

name: MacArthur Foundation
description: Supports creative people, effective institutions, and influential networks building a more just, verdant, and peaceful world.

name: European Union Development Fund
description: EU funding for development cooperation in ACP countries. Strong emphasis on governance, sustainability, and partnership.

name: Open Society Foundations
description: Works to build vibrant and tolerant societies. Funds civil society organizations fighting for accountability and open government.

name: UN Foundation
description: Connects the UN with partners to build a better world. Focused on SDGs and multilateral solutions to global challenges.
